reader_relationship: Neutral information provider; author positions themselves as an objective describer of the text's own attributes, making no attempt to engage, persuade, or instruct the reader.
word_choice_style: Uses only the most basic, neutral vocabulary; no contractions, no colloquialisms, no figurative language, no technical terms; adjectives are limited to minimal intrinsic descriptors (short, plain, matter-of-fact).
sentence_construction: Simple declarative sentences with subject-verb-complement order; no multi-clause constructions; participial phrases attached at the end without commas; no conjunctions or subordinators linking sentences.
punctuation_details: Only period is used; commas are omitted before the trailing participial phrase where convention might expect one; no dashes, quotation marks, parentheses, or other punctuation marks appear.
rhythm_description: Two sentences of nearly identical length (approximately 10–12 words each), creating a flat, unvaried rhythm with no contrast or pacing shift.
sentence_opener_patterns: First sentence opens with demonstrative pronoun ('This'); second sentence opens with impersonal pronoun ('It').
sentence_ending_patterns: Both sentences end with descriptive modifiers: first with a purpose clause ('used for...'), second with a style descriptor ('written in... style').
hedging_style: No hedging or qualifying language; all statements are direct and unqualified.
emphasis_style: No emphasis devices; no intensifiers, no repetition for effect, no contrastive structures.
humor_style: Humor is absent; no comedic devices or tonal shifts.
argument_style: No argument structure present; the text is purely descriptive, making no claim or point to be argued.
structural_conventions: Single paragraph, no headings, no lists, no formatting marks; extremely brief (2 sentences).

voice_fingerprints.pattern: Defines a subject by placing a demonstrative pronoun ('This') followed by a copula ('is'), an article, adjective, noun, and a purpose clause headed by 'used for'.

Describes additional properties of the subject with a sentence beginning with an impersonal pronoun ('It') and possessive verb ('has'), then a noun phrase, an infinitive phrase, and a trailing participial phrase without comma separation.
Omits commas before trailing participial phrases, even where standard punctuation might require them, creating a condensed, run-on reading.
Uses only present-tense copular and possessive verbs ('is', 'has') as main verbs; no auxiliary verbs, modals, or complex verb phrases.

negative_space: Never uses second-person pronouns (you, your, yourself).
Never uses imperative mood (commands or requests to the reader).
Never uses rhetorical questions to engage the reader.
Never uses metaphors, similes, analogies, or any figurative language.
Never employs structural elements such as headings, bullet points, numbered lists, or block quotes.
Never uses punctuation beyond periods (no commas, dashes, parentheses, exclamation marks, or quotation marks).
open_observations: The writer's voice is defined by extreme restraint and absence: every rhetorical device present in the AI-generated baseline—direct address, imperatives, rhetorical questions, figures of speech, structural markers—is deliberately avoided, resulting in a style that is purely informational and self-referential, with no attempt to influence, persuade, or even orient the reader.
